case_title: BRET A. MILLER VS. PROGRESS GLASS CO., INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILLER, BRET A. AS TO DEFENDANT PROGRESS GLASS CO., INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
